name: RESTRAINED || Parker Hensley
description:
ʙɪᴛɪɴɢ ʙᴀᴄᴋ

⊹ ࣪ ˖ CONTENT WARNINGS ℘

⚠︎︎ This story explores heavy emotional and psychological themes. Reader discretion advised.

Includes:

Outsider POV / emotionally isolated narrator

Verbal conflict and power imbalance

Bullying dynamics & social cruelty

Obsession, fixation, and unhealthy attachment

Anger turned inward and outward

Psychological distress and moral tension

Implied harm and unsettling imagery (non-graphic)

Themes of control, fear, and confrontation

Non-consensual undertones (narrative tension, future-facing only)
